title: Home
text:
Transdisciplinary researcher and educator.
My work sits at the intersection of:

Cybernetics & Complexity
Human × AI
Topological Data Analysis

I am interested in how patterns, behaviours, and meaning emerge in complex systems, and in developing conceptual and practical tools that help people navigate technological futures with clarity and care.
